criteria_results.criterion: lastServerResponseTimestamp が CurrentOutputResponse 型に含まれている
criteria_results.evidence: src/components/worktree/WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx line 133: lastServerResponseTimestamp?: number | null; in CurrentOutputResponse interface

criteria_results.criterion: fetchCurrentOutput() で lastServerResponseTimestamp がstateに保存されている
criteria_results.evidence: Line 200: useState<number | null>(null) for lastServerResponseTimestamp; Line 388: setLastServerResponseTimestamp(data.lastServerResponseTimestamp ?? null)

criteria_results.criterion: useAutoYes() に lastServerResponseTimestamp が渡されている
criteria_results.evidence: Line 968-975: useAutoYes({ worktreeId, cliTool: activeCliTab, isPromptWaiting, promptData, autoYesEnabled, lastServerResponseTimestamp })

criteria_results.criterion: サーバー応答後3秒以内にクライアントが同一プロンプトに応答しないことをテストで確認
criteria_results.evidence: src/hooks/useAutoYes.ts lines 20-21: DUPLICATE_PREVENTION_WINDOW_MS = 3000; lines 74-79: Skip if server responded within 3 seconds. Client-side duplicate prevention verified via code inspection. The preserve test (auto-yes-manager.test.ts line 1965-1998) also verifies timestamp propagation.

criteria_results.criterion: 同一 cliToolId で startAutoYesPolling() を再呼び出ししてもポーラーが再作成されないことをテストで確認
criteria_results.evidence: auto-yes-manager.test.ts line 1934-1948: 'should return already_running when same worktreeId + same cliToolId' - verifies second.reason === 'already_running' and getActivePollerCount() === 1

criteria_results.criterion: cliToolId が変わった場合はポーラーが正しく再作成されることをテストで確認
criteria_results.evidence: auto-yes-manager.test.ts line 1950-1963: 'should stop and recreate poller when cliToolId changes' - verifies second.reason is undefined (new poller) and count stays 1

criteria_results.criterion: already_running の場合に auto-yes/route.ts が正常応答を返すことをテストで確認
criteria_results.evidence: startAutoYesPolling returns { started: true, reason: 'already_running' } (auto-yes-poller.ts line 493). Route checks result.started (auto-yes/route.ts line 172). Test at auto-yes-manager.test.ts line 1934-1948 confirms started=true for already_running case.

criteria_results.criterion: current-output/route.ts で detectSessionStatus() に lastOutputTimestamp が渡されていることを確認
criteria_results.evidence: current-output/route.ts lines 83-91: const lastServerResponseTimestamp = getLastServerResponseTimestamp(params.id); const lastOutputTimestamp = lastServerResponseTimestamp ? new Date(lastServerResponseTimestamp) : undefined; detectSessionStatus(output, cliToolId, lastOutputTimestamp)

criteria_results.criterion: worktree-status-helper.ts で detectSessionStatus() に lastOutputTimestamp が渡されていることを確認
criteria_results.evidence: worktree-status-helper.ts lines 93-95: const ts = getLastServerResponseTimestamp(worktreeId); const lastOutputTimestamp = ts ? new Date(ts) : undefined; detectSessionStatus(output, cliToolId, lastOutputTimestamp)

criteria_results.criterion: worktree-status-helper.ts の変更に対するユニットテストを追加する（新規作成）
criteria_results.evidence: tests/unit/lib/worktree-status-helper.test.ts created with 3 tests: (1) passes Date to detectSessionStatus when timestamp exists, (2) passes undefined when null, (3) no change for non-running sessions. All pass.

criteria_results.criterion: サーバー応答後のステータス検出で既存の時間ベースヒューリスティックが機能し、waitingがすぐに解消されることを確認
criteria_results.evidence: status-detector.ts lines 404-410: Time-based heuristic checks elapsed > STALE_OUTPUT_THRESHOLD_MS when lastOutputTimestamp is provided. Both current-output/route.ts and worktree-status-helper.ts now pass lastOutputTimestamp from getLastServerResponseTimestamp(), enabling this heuristic after auto-yes server responses.

criteria_results.criterion: 既存のAuto-Yes関連テストが全てパスする
criteria_results.evidence: auto-yes-manager.test.ts: 110 tests passed (including all existing + 4 new Issue #501 idempotency tests)
252 test files passed, 5001 tests passed, 7 skipped. Duration: 15.22s
No output (clean exit, no type errors)

test_cases.evidence: Both current-output/route.ts and worktree-status-helper.ts pass lastOutputTimestamp from getLastServerResponseTimestamp(). worktree-status-helper.test.ts verifies with 3 test cases.
